items.name: Email address
items.sourceQuote: We collect your email address when you register.

items.name: IP address
items.sourceQuote: We log IP addresses for security purposes.

items.name: Usage data
items.sourceQuote: We collect data about how you use our service.

items.name: Payment information
items.sourceQuote: We collect payment card information for billing.

collectsPreciseGeolocation.sourceQuote: We collect approximate location from IP address but not precise GPS location.

collectsBiometricData.sourceQuote: We do not collect biometric data.

collectsHealthData.sourceQuote: We do not collect health data.

collectsFinancialData.sourceQuote: We collect payment card information for billing.

soldToThirdParties.sourceQuote: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

sharedForAdvertising.sourceQuote: We may share your data with advertising partners to deliver relevant ads.

crossSiteTracking.sourceQuote: We use cookies and tracking pixels that may track you across websites.

usedForProfiling.sourceQuote: We build user profiles to improve our product recommendations.

usedToTrainAI.sourceQuote: We may use aggregated, anonymized data to improve our AI features but do not use personal data for model training.

disclosedToLawEnforcement.sourceQuote: We may disclose your information in response to subpoenas, court orders, or other legal process.

thirdPartyRecipients.sourceQuote: We share data with advertising networks, analytics providers, payment processors, and security vendors.

provideCoreService.sourceQuote: We use your data to provide and improve our service.

securityFraudPrevention.sourceQuote: We use data to detect and prevent fraud.

legalRegulatoryCompliance.sourceQuote: We may use data to comply with legal obligations.

advertisingMarketing.sourceQuote: We use data to serve targeted advertising.

personalization.sourceQuote: We personalize your experience based on your usage data.

analyticsResearch.sourceQuote: We use analytics to understand how our service is used.

serviceImprovement.sourceQuote: We use data to improve our service.

aiMlTraining.sourceQuote: We do not use personal data to train AI models.

thirdPartyDataPartnerships.sourceQuote: We share data with advertising and analytics partners.

retention.summary: Data retained for up to 3 years after account closure.
retention.sourceQuote: We retain your data for up to 3 years after account closure.

rightToAccess.sourceQuote: You may request a copy of your personal data.

rightToDelete.sourceQuote: You may request deletion of your personal data.

rightToPortability.sourceQuote: You may request your data in a portable format.

rightToCorrect.sourceQuote: You may request correction of inaccurate data.

rightToOptOut.sourceQuote: You may opt out of marketing communications.

gpcDetail.sourceQuote: We do not currently respond to Global Privacy Control signals.

dntDetail.sourceQuote: We do not alter our data collection in response to Do Not Track signals.

encryptedInTransit.sourceQuote: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS.

encryptedAtRest.sourceQuote: Data at rest is protected using AES-256 encryption.

mfaAvailable.sourceQuote: Policy does not address MFA availability.

breachNotification.sourceQuote: Policy does not explicitly address breach notification timelines.

independentAudits.sourceQuote: We are SOC 2 Type II certified.
